_readme: v7 + 소급 타이밍 전수 검증 확정
title: I have my hands full

sentences.en: You understand what I'm saying, right? You do sell bonds, don't you, old sport?
sentences.ko: 무슨 말인지 알겠지? 자네 채권 파는 일 하잖나, 친구?

sentences.en: Right. Well, happens to be a rather confidential sort of thing, but you might make a nice bit of money.
sentences.ko: 그래. 좀 기밀에 속하는 일이긴 한데, 꽤 짭짤하게 벌 수 있을 거야.

sentences.en: ★ No, thank you. I have my hands full.
You wouldn't have to do any business with Wolfshiem, I assure you.
sentences.ko: 울프심과 엮일 일은 없을 거야, 장담하네.
